name: English Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring until all is dissolved.
3. Continue boiling without stirring until the mixture is a dark golden color.
4. Test by spooning a few drops into a cup of cold water. The toffee is done when it hardens immediately into a crisp ball.
5. Turn off heat and pour into a flat oiled pan, forming a layer about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Allow to cool completely, then score into squares.
7. When cooled, break with a hammer and store in an airtight container.
Makes about 1.5 pounds.
